design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Manage and play as a professional baseball team, experiencing the sport in arcade form

progression.upgrade_system: Team roster and player selection system
replayability_hooks: Multiple selectable teams to play as
Series spawned multiple sequels suggesting seasonal/competitive replay value

world_building_techniques: Team roster naming (developer staff names in Japanese version)
Authentic baseball terminology and scoreboard display

faction_indicators: Regional localization (Japanese vs American team names)
environmental_storytelling: Scoreboard displays with player names (developer credits embedded in gameplay)
Animated flags in Japanese version vs static UI in US version indicating regional identity

sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (Bases Loaded NES article)
